title: Skills That Pay the Bills Day
story: Every July 15, young people around the world show off their amazing talents on World Youth Skills Day! Kids post videos of themselves coding apps, baking perfect cupcakes, fixing bikes, or creating incredible art. Schools host talent shows where students demonstrate everything from robotics to woodworking. The day celebrates how learning new skills helps young people build bright futures and solve real problems in their communities.
activity_question: What do kids often post online during World Youth Skills Day?
activity_choices: Videos showing off their talents and skills
activity_answer: Videos showing off their talents and skills
follow_up_question: What skill would you most like to learn and show off?
